positions.title: Positions
positions.subtitle: A demonstration of football positions, with a breaf explanation of each one and my favorite ones

682500090ccd2c582316c76b.name: Goalkeeper
682500090ccd2c582316c76b.desc: Also known as keepers, he is resposible for staying under the goalposts and preventing goals of the opposing team, being the only one that can use his hands (inside the box, only). In today football, the good use of feet for ball-playing is essencial to be an elite goalkeeper, being also important on the building play. Some outstanding keepers are Buffon, Neuer, Courtois, Lev Yashin, Rogério Ceni, etc.

682500df0ccd2c582316c76c.name: Fullback
682500df0ccd2c582316c76c.desc: Wider on the defense side, with the goal to defend and attack the sides of the field, giving support to the wingers. They also can play in the playmaking role, working inside. Fullbacks like Alexander-Arnold, Cafú, Roberto Carlos, Marcelo, Daniel Alves e Lahm are some of the best of the history.

6825026b0ccd2c582316c76d.name: Centerback
6825026b0ccd2c582316c76d.desc: They have the role to defend and mark the attackers of the opposing team, blocking finishes and winning aerial and ground duels. Just like the keepers, centerbacks also have to know to ball-play, being one of the fundamental skills to this position nowaddays, emphasis to Sergio Ramos, Maldini, Cannavaro, Van Dijk, Beckenbauer and many other exemples.

682503250ccd2c582316c76e.name: Defensive midfielder
682503250ccd2c582316c76e.desc: Protects the defense line, being the most retreated player of the midfield. He has the role of defend and start the team plays after the centerbacks, as one of the hardest positions to play, because of the oponent pressure and the needed resistence. The best known are Busquets, Casemiro, Lothar Matthäus, Patrick Vieira, etc.

682503be0ccd2c582316c76f.name: Center midfielder
682503be0ccd2c582316c76f.desc: Responsible for the playming and team game control, with precise passes and good ball control. Currently, also have defensive duties, with some being called box-to-box. Some outstanding ones are: Xavi, Iniesta, Zidane, Pirlo, Gerrard, entre outros.

68250dadc216c551896b7031.name: Attacking midfielder
68250dadc216c551896b7031.desc: The most advenced position on midfield, also responsible for playmaking and chance creations, as stepping on the opposition box to score goals, generally being the player with a lot of goals and assists. Players like Johan Cruyff, Pelé, Kevin de Bruyne, Bellingham, and others, are exemples of this position.

68250e73c216c551896b7032.name: Winger
68250e73c216c551896b7032.desc: They stay on the sides, being responsible for creating chances both outside and inside. Good finishing and great dribbling foundation are what outstand wingers, with players like Neymar, Ronaldinho, Messi, Vinicius Jr., Yamal, etc.

68250f91c216c551896b7033.name: Striker
68250f91c216c551896b7033.desc: Player that stays on the opposition box, waiting for an opportunity to the ball coming to their feet or head to throw the ball into the back of the net, not just that, but helping in the building play. In most cases, it's the top scorer of the team, and a demonstration of this position are players like Gerd Müller, Lewandowski, Harry Kane, Cristiano Ronaldo, etc.
